frictions.description: Stdio MCP piping required paced writes and keeping stdin open briefly; immediate pipe close only returned initialize response.
frictions.resolution: Used one persistent stdio session per assertion with ~250ms inter-line delays and ~900ms drain time before closing stdin.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 4 passed, 3 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
